pages.title: Crucible
pages.text: With this crucible, I'm able to generate enough heat to be able to process $(l:innovation/metallurgy/steel)crucible steel.$()$(br2)I can fully fire it by having lit fires beneath it in a 3x3 horizontal area.

The most easily accessible source of heat for a crucible would be setting up $(l:newbeginning/fire_1#campfire)campfires$(), as they last quite a bit.$(br2)If I could get my hands on a bit of netherrack I could create something to $(l:innovation/burn/stoked_flame)stoke the fire$(), it would be the smartest thing to do next. Or perhaps I could source $(l:innovation/burn/valken_heater)something from the Valks$(), less efficient but much more versatile.
